title: Stephanocarpus monspeliensis
taxonomy: Stephanocarpus monspeliensis belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. The genus Stephanocarpus is part of the order Lamiales. It is native to the Mediterranean region, specifically in France and the Iberian Peninsula. The classification of Stephanocarpus monspeliensis is further categorized under the class Magnoliopsida. It is a flowering plant species within the plant kingdom.
uses: Stephanocarpus monspeliensis is a lesser-known plant species, and as such, comprehensive information on its medicinal uses is scarce.
